description_long: This dirt bike features a rugged, off-road design with a yellow and black color scheme accented by bold graphics and sponsor logos, most notably 'Rockstar'. The frame is constructed from metal, supporting a robust suspension system and knobby tires designed for traction on rough terrain. The seat is a long, narrow, and slightly raised unit in a reddish-brown color, optimized for maneuverability and comfort during aggressive riding. The handlebars are wide with a crossbar for added strength, and the front and rear fenders are extended to protect against mud and debris. The engine and exhaust system are exposed, with the exhaust pipe mounted high on the right side, typical of performance dirt bikes. The wheels feature cross-laced spokes for durability and shock absorption, and the overall build is lightweight yet sturdy, suitable for urban and off-road environments.
description: A yellow and black Rockstar-branded dirt bike with a high-mounted exhaust, cross-laced spoked wheels, and a reddish-brown seat, built for rugged off-road and urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide handlebars with crossbar, front fender, and knobby front tire.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the Rockstar graphics, engine, frame, and the full length of the reddish-brown seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the high-mounted exhaust, rear fender, and the back of the seat.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the exhaust system, engine, and detailed wheel structure.
